reviews.comment:
El gran problema es la fila de autos que se hace para cargar, entiendo que no hay mucho mas lugar para colocar nuevos surtidores pero deberia haber islas dobles  para que tenga un empleado por surtidor. Capaz asi se haga mas ágil la atención

(Translated by Google)
The big problem is the line of cars that forms to fill up. I understand there isn't much more room to install new pumps, but there should be double isles so there's one employee per pump. Maybe that would speed up service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHXzVfU1V3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre, te ponen descuentos y te abren un solo surtidor.  Estuve 40 minutos haciendo fila.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster. They give you discounts and only open one pump. I stood in line for 40 minutes.
